item.title: Two men guilty of 'callous' Brighton beach rape
item.description: The men had denied targeting the woman in the early hours of 4 October.

item.title: Trump administration reclassifies cannabis as less dangerous
item.description: Medical marijuana was moved into a lower category of drugs in order to increase research and access.

item.title: Sara Cox replaces Scott Mills on Radio 2 breakfast show
item.description: The 51-year-old, who is originally from Bolton, currently presents the teatime show on Radio 2.

item.title: Lamine Yamal season over but Spain star should make World Cup
item.description: Lamine Yamal will miss the rest of Barcelona's season with a hamstring injury but he is expected to return for Spain at the World Cup.

item.title: Israeli strikes kill eight Palestinians in Gaza, first responders say
item.description: One strike killed three children and two adults near a mosque in the northern town of Beit Lahia on Wednesday evening.
